headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Dow, First Solar, GM, GitLab, Roblox, Ross Stores, Target, Tesla, Toll Brothers, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: The futures are trading mixed as traders and investors came in yet again to buy the dip on Tuesday after the market opened, then plunged over 1,100 points before rallying back. While none of the major indices ended the day higher, as some did on Monday, they all recovered sharply from their ... headline: Freedom Capital Downgrades First Solar, Inc. (FSLR) to Hold and Reduces its Price Target to $250
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is among the 13 Most Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On February 26, 2026, Freedom Capital downgraded First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) to Hold from Buy and reduced its price target to $250 from $310. The firm said Q4 results missed estimates and the company issued “weak” 2026 guidance, adding […]
